description:
Implement `hx-overflow-menu` (T2 tier) — 3/6 enterprise libraries ship this. "..." or kebab menu that reveals hidden actions.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-overflow-menu/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-overflow-menu.ts`, `hx-overflow-menu.styles.ts`, `hx-overflow-menu.stories.ts`, `hx-overflow-menu.test.ts`

**Props:** `placement` (default `bottom-end`), `size` (sm/md/lg), `disabled` (boolean), `icon` (`vertical`|`horizontal` — kebab vs meatball dots orientation)

**Slots:** default (hx-menu-item children — same as hx-menu)

**Events:** `hx-select` with `{ value }`, `hx-show`, `hx-hide`

**CSS Parts:** `button` (the trigger icon button), `panel` (the floating menu)

**ARIA:** Trigger is `<button aria-label="More actions" aria-haspopup="true" aria-expanded>`. Panel is `role="menu"`. Same keyboard behavior as hx-dropdown.

**Implementation:** This is essentially `hx-dropdown` with a pre-built icon button trigger and sensible defaults for `placement`. Compose using `hx-icon-button` as the trigger and `hx-menu` as the panel. Avoid duplicating the positioning logic — reuse patterns from hx-tooltip/hx-dropdown.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests, axe-core zero violations (trigger must have accessible label), Storybook with vertical/horizontal icons + various item counts, bundle < 4KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-overflow-menu — T2 Overflow/More Actions Menu
